incident: 5xx surge: upstream app servers start returning 502/503 in bulk at 14:08 (trigger: upstream connect timeout spike) -> root cause: all upstream workers exhausted -> consequence: flood of 502s visible to clients; unrelated distractor: recurring 404s on /favicon.ico

ground_truth.needle: no live upstreams while connecting to upstream
upstream timed out (110: connection timed out)
ground_truth.desc: upstream latency spike preceding full failure
bad gateway errors returned to clients
